events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need decide pass/fail/needs_more_info. Scenario: structural welding, observed field condition: missing weld per drawing. Work rough-complete. Reference AWS D1.1. Missing weld per drawing is non-compliant. Decision fail. Risk high? Missing structural weld can be high or critical depending on load path. In heavy industrial structural, missing weld per drawing is a code violation (AWS D1.1 requires welds per WPS/drawings). Risk likely high.
